sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation found in sources

special_mechanics.name: Toad Movement on Objects
special_mechanics.description: Player directly controls Toad character who moves around inside the playing field atop fallen objects. Can pick up individual objects or lift entire stacks and place them elsewhere. Can kick objects across the play field and scurry up the sides of stacks to retrieve specific objects.

physics_values.can_reach_constraint: unable to manipulate objects not immediately reachable

special_mechanics.name: Object Stacking
special_mechanics.description: Objects can be lifted and stacked in the playing field. Thwomp may descend from top disguised as ceiling, reducing available play space.

tier_notes: Tier 2: This is a puzzle game, not a platformer. No precise movement physics parameters are documented in available sources. Movement is character-based within a grid-like puzzle field rather than traditional platformer physics. No numerical values for gravity, jump velocity, acceleration, or sub-pixel precision found.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Wario's Woods (SNES)
